all.en: Our Human Resources team is launching a new diversity and inclusion workshop.
all.zh: 本公司人力資源團隊將推出全新的多元共融工作坊。

all.en: This workshop is part of our broader commitment to a respectful workplace.
all.zh: 本工作坊為公司打造尊重職場的整體承諾之一。

all.en: It will be offered to all employees in waves throughout the second quarter.
all.zh: 本課程將於第二季分梯次提供給全體員工。

all.en: Each session is half a day and includes both lectures and group activities.
all.zh: 每場課程為半天，涵蓋講授與小組活動。

all.en: Sessions are scheduled on Wednesday and Friday afternoons.
all.zh: 課程安排於每週三與週五下午舉行。

all.en: The first session will take place on April 9 at the main training center.
all.zh: 首場課程將於 4 月 9 日在主訓練中心舉行。

all.en: Remote employees may join through our secure video conferencing platform.
all.zh: 遠端工作員工可透過安全視訊會議平台加入。

all.en: The workshop is led by Dr. Marisol Vega, an experienced organizational consultant.
all.zh: 本工作坊由經驗豐富的組織顧問 Marisol Vega 博士主持。

all.en: She has facilitated similar programs at companies across more than ten countries.
all.zh: 她曾於十多國的企業帶領類似課程。

all.en: Topics will include unconscious bias, inclusive language, and allyship.
all.zh: 課程主題包括無意識偏見、包容性語言與盟友關係。

all.en: Participants will explore real workplace scenarios in small group discussions.
all.zh: 學員將透過小組討論探討真實的職場情境。

all.en: Case studies are drawn from anonymized situations across various industries.
all.zh: 案例研究取自各產業匿名化的真實情境。

all.en: Participants will also reflect on their own experiences and perspectives.
all.zh: 學員亦將反思自身的經驗與觀點。

all.en: Each group will produce a short action plan to share with their managers.
all.zh: 每組將提出簡短行動方案並與其主管分享。

all.en: Optional follow-up coaching sessions are available for interested teams.
all.zh: 有意願的團隊可申請選修後續輔導課程。

all.en: Attendance is strongly encouraged but not strictly required.
all.zh: 強烈建議參加，但不強制要求。

all.en: Department leaders are asked to support team members who wish to attend.
all.zh: 請各部門主管支持有意參加的同仁。

all.en: Please register through the HR portal at least one week before each session.
all.zh: 請於每場課程開始前至少一週透過人資入口網站報名。

all.en: Resource materials will be added to our internal library after each workshop.
all.zh: 每場工作坊結束後，相關資源將上架至內部知識庫。

all.en: We welcome anonymous feedback through the employee experience survey.
all.zh: 歡迎透過員工體驗問卷以匿名方式提供回饋。

all.en: Our goal is to create an environment where every voice is valued.
all.zh: 我們的目標是打造一個重視每一個聲音的環境。

all.en: Diversity and inclusion are essential to innovation and team performance.
all.zh: 多元與共融對創新與團隊績效至關重要。

all.en: Thank you for participating in this important learning initiative.
all.zh: 感謝您參與這項重要的學習計畫。

all.en: Questions can be directed to the HR business partner for your department.
all.zh: 如有任何問題，請洽所屬部門的人資業務夥伴。

all.en: An employee resource group network will be formally launched later this year.
all.zh: 員工資源社群網絡將於今年稍後正式啟動。

all.en: Monthly lunch and learn events will feature guest speakers on inclusion topics.
all.zh: 每月午餐學習會將邀請共融議題客座講者分享。

all.en: All managers will receive additional training on inclusive leadership practices.
all.zh: 所有主管將另接受包容性領導實務的進階訓練。

all.en: Our recruitment process will be reviewed to remove unintentional barriers to entry.
all.zh: 招募流程將進行檢視，以消除無意間造成的入職障礙。

all.en: Mentorship pairings across departments support career growth for underrepresented groups.
all.zh: 跨部門導師配對可協助代表性不足族群的職涯發展。

all.en: A new accessibility audit will be conducted across all our office locations.
all.zh: 本公司各據點將進行全新的無障礙設施稽核。

all.en: Updates to our policies will be shared transparently through the company intranet.
all.zh: 公司政策更新將透過內部網站以透明方式公告。

all.en: Annual diversity metrics will be published in our corporate responsibility report.
all.zh: 年度多元化指標將於企業社會責任報告中公開揭露。

all.en: External partnerships with community organizations will be expanded next year.
all.zh: 明年將擴大與在地社區組織的外部合作夥伴關係。

all.en: Together, we will continue to build a workplace where everyone can truly belong.
all.zh: 我們將共同持續打造讓每個人皆能真正歸屬的職場。

all.en: Pronoun preferences will be supported in email signatures and internal directory profiles.
all.zh: 電子郵件簽名與內部通訊錄資料將支援代名詞偏好設定。

all.en: Inclusive meeting practices will be promoted through a new manager toolkit this summer.
all.zh: 今年夏季將透過新的主管工具包推廣包容式會議實務。

all.en: Cultural awareness calendars will highlight key observances throughout the year.
all.zh: 文化覺察日曆將標示全年的重要節日與紀念日。

all.en: Employee storytelling videos will be released monthly to celebrate diverse experiences.
all.zh: 每月將發布員工故事影片，慶祝多元的經驗與背景。

all.en: Internal speakers will be invited to share insights from their own career journeys.
all.zh: 公司將邀請內部講者分享自身的職涯歷程與心得。

all.en: Recruitment partnerships with local universities aim to broaden our pipeline of talent.
all.zh: 與在地大學的招募合作旨在拓展人才來源管道。

all.en: Internship programs will reserve dedicated spots for first-generation college students.
all.zh: 實習計畫將為家中首位大學生族群保留專屬名額。

all.en: Feedback channels are reviewed quarterly to ensure all voices reach senior leadership.
all.zh: 每季檢視回饋管道以確保所有聲音皆能傳達給高階主管。

all.en: Our progress against diversity goals will be reviewed openly at the annual town hall.
all.zh: 多元化目標的進展將於年度全員大會上公開檢視。

all.en: We sincerely thank everyone for helping create a more equitable and welcoming organization.
all.zh: 由衷感謝每一位協助打造更公平且具歡迎氛圍的組織。

all.en: My team had honest conversations during the workshop that we never could have had over a typical Monday meeting.
all.zh: 我們組在工作坊上的對話都很坦誠，這種交流是平常週一會議裡絕對發生不了的。

all.en: Honestly, the unconscious bias exercise was uncomfortable, but it changed how I word my emails to my team now.
all.zh: 老實說無意識偏見那個練習讓人很不自在，但確實改變了我現在寫信給團隊的措辭。

all.en: Have you ever realized in the middle of a meeting that you have been talking over the same person repeatedly?
all.zh: 你有沒有開會開到一半才發現，自己一直打斷同一個人講話？

all.en: My manager added her pronouns to her email signature, and within a week half the department had followed her example.
all.zh: 我主管在郵件簽名加上她的代名詞，不到一週部門裡一半的人就跟著做了。

all.en: I learned about a culture from a coworker over lunch that I never would have thought to ask about otherwise.
all.zh: 我午餐時從同事那裡認識了一種我平常根本不會想到要問的文化。

all.en: Honestly, I was skeptical when I signed up, but the case studies hit way closer to home than I expected.
all.zh: 說真的我報名時還有點懷疑，但那些案例研究比我想像中更貼近我的實際工作。

all.en: My friend in HR said attendance was much higher than last year, which she took as a really good sign.
all.zh: 我人資的朋友說今年出席率比去年高很多，她覺得這是一個很好的徵兆。

all.en: I joined an employee resource group last month and finally found people who understand what my career feels like.
all.zh: 我上個月加入一個員工資源社群，終於找到一群人懂我職涯走過的感受。

all.en: Honestly, my favorite part was hearing senior leaders admit they still make mistakes and are still learning daily.
all.zh: 老實說我最喜歡的部分，是聽到高階主管承認他們也還在犯錯、每天都還在學習。

all.en: Just a tip: speak up when you notice something off in a meeting, even if it makes the room briefly awkward.
all.zh: 小提醒：開會時發現有不對勁的地方就要說出來，即使會讓現場短暫尷尬一下也沒關係。
